title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at IRCTC Logistics

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at IRCTC Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Join the IRCTC Logistics family as a Logistics Manager in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IRCTC Logistics:
IRCTC Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IRCTC Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
